hero_subtitle: SFTY provides a unified compliance operating layer that strengthens auditability, supports bank due diligence, and delivers clear visibility across digital asset compliance workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit trails become harder to defend
problem_description: Executive teams struggle with incomplete visibility as compliance evidence scatters between multiple tools and provider outputs. This fragmentation slows review cycles, weakens audit readiness and complicates preparation for regulatory inspections or bank due diligence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates provider outputs, case records, decision logs and audit evidence into a single compliance control layer that delivers executives clear visibility across risk, workflows and regulatory readiness.
workflow_title: From case creation to audit-ready evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes compliance alerts, provider outputs and reviews into structured cases that preserve decision evidence for clear audit and regulatory reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another provider. One audit control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives VASP leaders a provider-neutral compliance layer that links workflows, decisions and evidence to support defensible audit trails and clear operational visibility.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP executives with a controlled compliance layer that supports defensible audit trails, provider orchestration, bank due diligence and secure enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance executives with a connected control layer that connects workflows, rules, cases and evidence for clearer risk visibility and scalable audit-ready operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY build defensible audit trails?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures fragmented compliance data into case-based workflows with version-controlled rule updates and detailed decision logs, creating audit trails that support defensible compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How are compliance decisions and evidence preserved?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves all case history, reviewer decisions and supporting evidence in secure, access-controlled logs, supporting traceability and review readiness across compliance activities.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, turning their outputs into structured workflows without disrupting existing compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above your providers, connecting their data into workflows, cases and reports rather than replacing underlying KYC, KYT or Travel Rule services.
final_title: Build audit-ready workflows for VASP compliance
final_description: Review how SFTY structures provider outputs into defensible cases, decision logs and evidence for executive risk control.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
